basicDetails.schemeName: Fodder Minikits under Tribal Area Sub Plan (TASP) Scheme (ST Category)
basicDetails.implementingAgency: Directorate Of Animal Husbandry, Government Of Gujarat

nodalDepartmentName.label: Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department

schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme “Fodder Minikits under Tribal Area Sub Plan (TASP) Scheme” is implemented by the Directorate of Animal Husbandry, Government of Gujarat to provide an improved variety of fodder seeds to Scheduled Tribe beneficiaries for widespread publicity, demonstration, and adaptation by farmers.
schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme “Fodder Minikits under Tribal Area Sub Plan (TASP) Scheme” is implemented by the Directorate of Animal Husbandry, Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Co-operation Department, Government of Gujarat. Under this scheme, improved varieties of fodder seeds are provided to beneficiaries for widespread publicity, demonstration and adaptation by farmers.
schemeContent.benefits_md: 1. Under this scheme, the fodder seed minikit of 3 Kg, 7 Kg or 10 Kg is given to the eligible beneficiary.

children.text: The scheme “Fodder Minikits under Tribal Area Sub Plan (TASP) Scheme” is implemented by the Directorate of Animal Husbandry, Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Co-operation Department, Government of Gujarat. Under this scheme, improved varieties of fodder seeds are provided to beneficiaries for widespread publicity, demonstration and adaptation by farmers.
Under this scheme, the fodder seed minikit of 3 Kg, 7 Kg or 10 Kg is given to the eligible beneficiary.
To avail the benefits of the scheme, the beneficiary may contact a nearby

applicationProcess.process_md: To avail the benefits of the scheme, the beneficiary may contact a nearby [Veterinary Dispensary](https://farmer.gov.in/vetcentres.aspx?scode=04) or First Aid Veterinary Centre.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. The beneficiary should be a permanent resident of Gujarat.
   1. The beneficiary of the Scheduled Tribe (ST) category can avail the benefit under this scheme.
   1. The beneficiary should possess 10 Guntha of land to his or her name.

children.text: The beneficiary should be a permanent resident of Gujarat.
The beneficiary of the Scheduled Tribe (ST) category can avail the benefit under this scheme.
The beneficiary should possess 10 Guntha of land to his or her name.
